# 2026-06-01 — Cedar Marsh again

Warm, buggy. Back at the [Cedar Marsh Boardwalk](../trails/cedar-marsh.md) to
check on the [cardinal flower](../species/plants/cardinal-flower.md) — budding
now, not yet in bloom. Worth another walk in July.

The [heron](../species/birds/great-blue-heron.md) was at the same channel as
[May 9](2026-05-09.md). Might be nesting nearby. ^heron-channel

Cross-referencing in wikilink form: back to [[cedar-marsh|the boardwalk]] and
the [[species/plants/cardinal-flower]] page. Species card for the record:
